# Start Here

Use this thread if you are trying CtxVault for the first time and are not sure
where your feedback belongs.

A useful first report includes:

- the command or demo you tried;
- the AI tools, notes, or rules files you currently use;
- where context became hard to carry, inspect, or trust;
- which receipt, projection, or review step was confusing.

Use Issues for reproducible bugs, trust/privacy problems, and concrete
integration requests.
